testcase.name: handleSearch() — context routing > switching to entities calls runEntitySearch (spy) not storage.searchChats
handleSearch() — context routing > switching back to chats does not call entity search
setupSearchContextToggle() — visibility > entity-type chips section is shown when context switches to entities
setupSearchContextToggle() — visibility > entity-type chips section is hidden when context switches back to chats
setupSearchContextToggle() — visibility > chat filter groups are hidden when context switches to entities
setupSearchContextToggle() — visibility > chat filter groups are restored when switching back to chats
setupSearchContextToggle() — visibility > state.searchContext is updated on toggle
entity-type chips (A.8) — population > setupSearchContextToggle creates one chip per ENTITY_TYPES value
entity-type chips (A.8) — population > each chip carries the correct data-entity-type
entity-type chips (A.8) — population > activating a chip adds the type to state.filters.entityTypes
entity-type chips (A.8) — population > activating the same chip again removes the type
entity-type chips (A.8) — population > active chip gets is-active class, inactive loses it
runEntitySearch() — entityTypes passthrough (A.8) > passes active entityTypes Set to the handler
runEntitySearch() — entityTypes passthrough (A.8) > passes empty Set when no chips are active
debounce() > delays the function until the timeout expires
debounce() > resets the timer when called repeatedly
debounce() > .cancel() prevents the pending invocation
hideSearchResults() > hides the search results container
hideSearchResults() > clears the results list innerHTML
hideSearchResults() > does not throw when elements are absent
clearSearch() > clears the search input value
clearSearch() > hides the clearSearchBtn
clearSearch() > clears searchQuery on state
clearSearch() > calls renderer.clearHighlight() when no active filters
clearSearch() > runs search when active filters exist
testcase.system-err: [bAInder] [ERROR] Search failed: TypeError: Cannot set properties of null (setting 'textContent') at renderSearchResults (C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/src/sidepanel/controllers/search-controller.js:175:36) at C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/src/sidepanel/controllers/search-controller.js:104:7

testcase.name: rerunSearch() > hides results when no query and no active filters
rerunSearch() > triggers a deferred search when query is non-empty
testcase.system-err: [bAInder] [ERROR] Search failed: TypeError: Cannot set properties of null (setting 'textContent') at renderSearchResults (C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/src/sidepanel/controllers/search-controller.js:175:36) at C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/src/sidepanel/controllers/search-controller.js:104:7

testcase.name: rerunSearch() > triggers search when there are active filters but no query
testcase.system-err: [bAInder] [ERROR] Search failed: TypeError: Cannot set properties of null (setting 'textContent') at renderSearchResults (C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/src/sidepanel/controllers/search-controller.js:175:36) at C:/Repos/Personal/bAInder/src/sidepanel/controllers/search-controller.js:104:7

testcase.name: renderSearchResults() > shows the search results container
renderSearchResults() > shows "0 results" for empty results
renderSearchResults() > shows "1 result" for a single result
renderSearchResults() > renders a result card for each result
renderSearchResults() > renders empty-state HTML when results are empty
buildResultCard() > returns an article element HTML string
buildResultCard() > includes the chat title
buildResultCard() > uses "Untitled Chat" when title is missing
buildResultCard() > renders a badge for known sources
buildResultCard() > renders badge--unknown for unrecognised sources
buildResultCard() > renders rating stars when chat.rating is set
buildResultCard() > renders tag chips when tags are present
buildResultCard() > highlights matching query terms in the title
populateTopicScopeSelect() > does nothing when element is absent
populateTopicScopeSelect() > does nothing when state.tree is absent
populateTopicScopeSelect() > populates one option per root topic plus "All topics"
populateTopicScopeSelect() > pre-selects the current filter topicId
updateFilterIndicator() > does nothing when filterToggleBtn is absent
updateFilterIndicator() > adds has-active-filters class when a source filter is set
updateFilterIndicator() > removes has-active-filters class when no filters are active
updateFilterIndicator() > adds has-active-filters when dateFrom is set
updateFilterIndicator() > adds has-active-filters when minRating is set
populateTagFilterPills() > does nothing when filterTagPills container is absent
populateTagFilterPills() > shows "No tags saved yet" when no chats have tags
populateTagFilterPills() > renders one pill per unique tag
populateTagFilterPills() > marks already-active tags with is-active class
populateTagFilterPills() > clicking an inactive pill activates it and adds to state.filters.tags
setupFilterBar() — filterToggleBtn > toggles the filter bar open on button click
setupFilterBar() — filterToggleBtn > closes the filter bar on second click
setupFilterBar() — source pills > adds source to filters when a pill is clicked
setupFilterBar() — source pills > removes source from filters when active pill is clicked again
setupFilterBar() — date range > sets dateFrom on change
setupFilterBar() — date range > sets dateFrom to null when cleared
setupFilterBar() — date range > sets dateTo on change
setupFilterBar() — topic scope > updates topicId when select changes
setupFilterBar() — rating pills > sets minRating when rating pill is clicked
setupFilterBar() — rating pills > clears minRating when the same rating pill is clicked again
setupFilterBar() — clear button > resets all filters on clear
setupFilterBar() — clear button > removes is-active class from source and rating pills on clear
setSearchContext() > sets searchContext to entities
setSearchContext() > sets searchContext back to chats
setSearchContext() > activates the entities button when switching to entities
setSearchContext() > activates the chats button when switching to chats
setSearchContext() > shows entityTypes group when switching to entities
setSearchContext() > hides entityTypes group when switching to chats
refreshEntityTypeChipVisibility() > does nothing when filterEntityTypePills container is absent
setSearchContext() — re-runs search when searchQuery is active > calls entity search handler when switching to entities with an active query
setSearchContext() — re-runs search when searchQuery is active > calls rerunSearch (chatRepo.searchChats) when switching to chats with active query
setupSearchContextToggle() — re-runs entity search when query is active > clicking entities button calls entity search handler when query is active
setupSearchContextToggle() — re-runs entity search when query is active > clicking chats button re-runs chat search when query is active
